note: B.3 selector-less bare-ETH stake. Sending ETH with EMPTY calldata + value > 0 to stETH hits Lido's payable fallback() (NON_EMPTY_DATA-guarded: require(msg.data.length == 0)), which calls _submit(0) and mints stETH to the sender. It has NO 4-byte function selector, so it is keyed under the reserved sentinel selector 0x00000000 — the all-zero 4-byte word, which still satisfies the '0x' + 8-hex SELECTOR_RE that build-index + the SW bundle parser enforce. The WASM route (declarative_route_request_v3_json) substitutes this sentinel for the lookup key ONLY when calldata is empty, so it can never collide with a real dispatch (a genuine selector requires >= 4 calldata bytes). Decoded as liquid_staking.stake with amount=$tx.value (the staked ETH); referral is absent (the fallback path passes referral=0).
